***Poecilomorpha cribricollis*** is a species of [beetle](/wiki/Beetle "Beetle") in the family [Megalopodidae](/wiki/Megalopodidae "Megalopodidae"). This species is found in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

Adults reach a length of about 7.4 mm. The head, antennae, [pronotum](/wiki/Pronotum "Pronotum") and [elytra](/wiki/Elytra "Elytra") basal thirds are orange, while the apical two-thirds of the [elytra](/wiki/Elytra "Elytra") is iridescent black. The mandibles, legs and abdomen are brown.[[1]](#cite_note-1)
